Services

What you get beyond the sale

Buying a phone is one thing — getting the big appliances home, installed and working is another.

EMI & Finance Assistance

Help picking the right finance scheme for bigger purchases.

Home Delivery

Get your purchase delivered instead of carrying it yourself.

Installation & Demo

Set-up help for TVs, fridges and washing machines.

Easy Exchange / Upgrade

Offers & Gifts

Finance made easy

0% interest & zero down payment options available

Big purchases like a new TV or refrigerator are easier with flexible EMI plans — ask our team which scheme fits what you're buying.
